channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Medics attend to fan who collapsed courtside at Spurs, Grizzlies game
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Medics attended to a fan who collapsed courtside Monday night before the San Antonio Spurs vs. Memphis Grizzlies game. The teams were preparing for the opening tipoff when attention turned to the courtside seats.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Travis Kelce is in no hurry to retire even if the Chiefs win another Super Bowl
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Travis Kelce has no plans to retire anytime soon even if the Kansas City Chiefs win a third straight Super Bowl on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eagles' Saquon Barkley makes clear 'dream wasn't just getting' to Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles star running back Saquon Barkley made clear the dream season has yet to be realized with Super Bowl LIX around the corner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Commanders' Josh Harris maintains team name is here to stay
item.description: Washington Commanders team owner Josh Harris made it clear on Monday the team name is here to stay and that the fans are getting behind it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Controlling owner Josh Harris says the Washington Commanders name is not changing
item.description: ASHBURN, Va. (AP) — Washington Commanders controlling owner Josh Harris said Monday the team name is not changing. Harris said the name is here to stay after inheriting it when he and his group bought the team from longtime owner Dan Snyder in 2023.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLB ump fired amid gambling probe
item.description: Major League Baseball has fired an umpire as part of an investigation into sports gambling. Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball, according to ESPN reporter Jesse Rogers and later confirmed by the league.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Chiefs' DeAndre Hopkins sends inspirational message before 1st Super Bowl appearance
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver DeAndre Hopkins fired off an inspirational message to struggling kids ahead of his first Super Bowl appearance.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Doncic releases emotional farewell message to Dallas after trade sends him to Lakers
item.description: Luka Doncic released an emotional farewell to Dallas on Sunday, the same day a trade sending him from the Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers in a swap for fellow All-NBA player Anthony Davis was finalized.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bulls trade Zach LaVine to Kings
item.description: The Chicago Bulls are trading star shooting guard Zach LaVine to the Sacramento Kings, according to ESPN's Shams Charania.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, NewsNation

item.title: Luka Doncic heads to the Lakers and Anthony Davis goes to the Mavs in blockbuster trade
item.description: The trade was put together in secret, with only a precious few people knowing what was happening. Luka Doncic didn't know. Anthony Davis didn't know. Their coaches didn't know. Their teammates didn't know. And then it happened — an absolute blockbuster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Drew Brees serves up pickleball to beloved New Orleans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS - Drew Brees had his fair share of fun in New Orleans, taking the Saints to football heaven. Now. the future Hall of Famers found a second line of work, quarterbacking one of the fastest growing sports in America. "Look. I'm a sports junkie, right? I love ping pong. I love tennis.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: Watch: Fans boo US national anthem at NHL game in Canada
item.description: The booing came shortly after Trump signed an order imposing stiff tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico, and China.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: Aggies go cold in battle for first place
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In the biggest game of the season, the Utah State basketball team had one of its worst offensive performances of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: A Blackhawks record: Landon Slaggert scores 7 seconds into a game against Florida
item.description: Landon Slaggert scored seven seconds into Chicago's game at the Panthers on Saturday afternoon — the fastest goal to start a game ever for the Blackhawks, according to the NHL record book.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Meet the puppies representing San Diego in 2025 Puppy Bowl
item.description: Just ahead of the Super Bowl LIX matchup between the Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles, the Puppy Bowl XXI kicks off Super Bowl Sunday with a morning competition between hundreds of rescue puppies.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: CMU Baseball Ethan Nunez gears up for sophomore year
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Just a year ago, Ethan Nunez had no college offers. Now, the Colorado Mesa infielder holds one of the highest honors in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference (RMAC). “I couldn’t believe it, honestly,” Nunez said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Girls Basketball: Oceanside 36, La Costa Canyon 31
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls basketball senior night for Oceanside hosting La Costa Canyon. Pirates squeak by the Mavericks 36-31.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Where to watch Super Bowl LIX in San Diego
item.description: Football fans who want to participate in the excitement of Super Bowl LIX without traveling to New Orleans or watching from their living room can watch the big game at several venues in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Grand Valley Climbing Gym to host climbing competition
item.description: Zangrilli states, “The coolest thing for us is watching kids that come to us join our program, who have zero climbing experience, very quickly, find a really nice core group of kids on the team, and through that team community, they start to thrive.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Kawamoto, KREX 5

item.title: Jazz drop eighth straight with 138-113 loss to Minnesota
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Anthony Edwards scored 16 of his 36 points in the third quarter and the Minnesota Timberwolves routed the Utah 138-113 on Thursday for their fifth straight victory and second in two nights.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Declan Doyle: The 28-year-old COO of Ben Johnson's offense
item.description: Declan Doyle, a 28-year-old Iowan, is the new offensive coordinator for the Chicago Bears, tasked with creating buy-in and being the COO of Ben Johnson's offense.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: MMA fighter praises Hitler, calls him a 'good guy' in podcast
item.description: UFC fighter Bryce Mitchell praised Adolf Hitler and denied the Holocaust happened in the first episode of his new podcast.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: NFL kicker Justin Tucker accused of sexual misconduct by 6 masseuses: report
item.description: Justin Tucker, kicker for the Baltimore Ravens, has been accused by six massage therapists at four separate businesses of sexually inappropriate behavior, the Baltimore Banner reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KTLA 5

item.title: Girls Basketball: Francis Parker 46, La Jolla Country Day 45
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO) - Marquee matchup out at Francis Parker as they play host to La Jolla Country Day. Francis Parker's Brianna Mendez and Isabella Riddle would combine for 28 points on the night, leading the charge in their 46-45 win over La Jolla Country Day.. a feat some may had not seen coming.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5
